text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: We're at the autumn Tenno Sho and...

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon has stupefied the audience with her
incredible performance!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon wasn't on top of her game today,
but I saw something in that run—something to
look forward to in her next races!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
As for Narita Brian... From what it looks like, she's
yet to make a complete recovery post-comeback.

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Huff, huff...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian stands there, a prodigy stripped of
her former strength. Hushed conversations begin
to ripple through the stands.

text_block_list.name: Fan A
text_block_list.text:
Are her injuries not fully healed or something? I
wonder if she'll ever be able to make a full
recovery like this...

text_block_list.name: Fan B
text_block_list.text:
Will we ever be able to see Narita Brian in her
prime again?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
choice_data_list:
Doesn't look like Narita Brian's back in top form
yet.

Doesn't look like Narita Brian's back in top form
yet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
No, but I could feel it comin' back to her as we
ran.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Still, it feels like there's something missing. But
what could it be?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Teach! Let's head back to Tracen and do
some uphill sprints!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She shouldn't have the energy to run inclines right
after a G1... but I ask her motive nonetheless.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: I'm startin' to see what I need to do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
And in order to see that through, I've gotta aim
high.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That's... abstract, but I can tell she's serious. If
this is what it takes to make the one-on-one with
Brian a reality, so be it.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
To fans, the pair's rivalry might look different
now... but I know they haven't changed a bit.
choice_data_list: All right, let's do it then!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, we pour our efforts into training, day
after day.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: A few days later...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
Today, we have an impressive racer with us. She's
taking the world by storm with her amazing
running skills, and has won a slew of G1 races...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
And that racer is none other than Hishi Amazon!
Thank you for agreeing to be interviewed right
before the Japan Cup!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Thanks, the pleasure is mine!

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
To start, I recall you naming Narita Brian your
rival at the Arima Kinen last year...

text_block_list.name: Interviewer
text_block_list.text:
But who would you say is your rival for the Japan
Cup?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
My rival is the same as always—Narita Brian! I'm
gonna work hard to overcome her!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's no secret that Narita Brian has been in poor
health, so the entire room leans in, curious to
hear the rest of Hishi Amazon's answer.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I know she's been off her game, and I know her
fans are feeling let down—worried.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She isn't back to runnin' like the beast you knew.
That speaks for itself, but...

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
She's not done just yet. I'm sure you know this as
well as I do.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian isn't strong just because she's
"talented."

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She's strong because she never stops running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Hishi Amazon's frank declaration stuns the press
conference hall into still silence.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
There's no need to worry about her. She's gonna
be okay.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: She's the Narita Brian, y'know. She'll be able to make her way back to the top, no matter what.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Who my rival is will never change.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her stance on the matter spreads through the
media like wildfire...

text_block_list.name: Passerby A
text_block_list.text:
Hey, did you see that interview with Hishi
Amazon? The one where she said Narita Brian is
still her rival.

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I did. I've gotta admit, her speech really hit
me in the heart...

text_block_list.name: Passerby B
text_block_list.text:
And she's right, y'know? The look on Narita
Brian's face when she runs is just as fierce as it
always was.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Slowly, the public's opinion of Narita Brian begins
to shift.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Okay, let's do this, Teach!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I watch as Hishi Amazon, strong and gallant as
ever, sprints up the incline.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's not much longer now until the Japan Cup.
